{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322025616079BD779360231A7DC9D\"}"},"total":5045},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7048447351811769123","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"除了最后烂尾以外，确实写的蛮好的，章节数也足够看的够爽，期待你的下一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641094542,"group_id":"6873346215501630471","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0q0sH2GrXf1JqRzYV4HY7xIhQxA4fnVybAGSm9ftUcA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7150f99ee8c34c4fb7ac420a6315236d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776708996\u0026x-signature=5KIomZymRwmzbEbyMQIyyoFlQoM%3D","user_id":"3518863365417951","user_name":"世界语言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3518863365417951","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1768928730,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6873346215501630471","book_info":{"abstract":"夜风穿越到了火影世界。绑定了一个签到就能变强的系统。从此，忍界许多稀奇古怪的地方，都会有一个佩刀少年出没。宇智波斑：听说夜风那双眼睛名为转生眼，虽不知是何来历，但威力绝不比老夫的轮回眼弱。大蛇丸：如果不是夜风的刀法太恐怖，我才不稀罕宇智波家的美瞳呢。自来也：别的就不说了，至少在创作方面，我自来也愿称夜风为最强！八尾人柱力：说起来都是泪啊...我可能就是妨碍到他签到了...然后我的徒弟就被他抢走了。我叫夜风。乘风破浪的风。我的原则很简单。谁不让我签到，我就怼谁。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/51fcf0aefc47638bf5c3579261bbf70a","author":"风希","author_id":"","book_id":"6873346215501630471","book_name":"诸天：从火影开始签到","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c07838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":71,\"name\":\"诸天万界\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71\u0026name=诸天万界\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":368,\"name\":\"火影\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=368\u0026name=火影\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6873355412297485319","read_count":"36531","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3034310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1555","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,诸天万界,火影,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/0794b6cbff1a4f17eba78d462cb90dfc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779303376\u0026x-signature=Qs65DSkHwdxjZR%2Fp70SUy6TjYqU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"756104836419911","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.4910481e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322025616079BD779360231A7DC9D\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":94908,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":28188},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7078333788270658319","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，有火影，超神，死神，海贼，斗罗，斗破，我自身感觉就火影写得不错，后面感觉没那么精彩，不过还是可以的，望作者大大继续努力！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1648053032,"group_id":"6873346215501630471","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾乃无极天尊，阅书成尊，请各位道友留步（分类书是个人喜欢）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/wDd3NqLRR39JPZNsceMgs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/9d1b45de459a4e83a8accc0c5e2a12d6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706365\u0026x-signature=d%2BwerUFK3tkUb0vsi%2B%2BN0PUxxYY%3D","user_id":"654956251078459","user_name":"诸天学院"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"654956251078459","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705119319,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6873346215501630471","book_info":{"abstract":"夜风穿越到了火影世界。绑定了一个签到就能变强的系统。从此，忍界许多稀奇古怪的地方，都会有一个佩刀少年出没。宇智波斑：听说夜风那双眼睛名为转生眼，虽不知是何来历，但威力绝不比老夫的轮回眼弱。大蛇丸：如果不是夜风的刀法太恐怖，我才不稀罕宇智波家的美瞳呢。自来也：别的就不说了，至少在创作方面，我自来也愿称夜风为最强！八尾人柱力：说起来都是泪啊...我可能就是妨碍到他签到了...然后我的徒弟就被他抢走了。我叫夜风。乘风破浪的风。我的原则很简单。谁不让我签到，我就怼谁。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://
